CustomField.formula: IF(ISPICKVAL(Status, '102'), 'open', IF(ISPICKVAL(Status, '103'), 'open', IF(ISPICKVAL(Status, '105'), 'open', IF(ISPICKVAL(Status, '2'), 'pending', IF(ISPICKVAL(Status, '51'), 'pending', IF(ISPICKVAL(Status, '115'), 'pending', IF(ISPICKVAL(Status, '116'), 'pending', IF(ISPICKVAL(Status, '110'), 'closed', IF(ISPICKVAL(Status, '111'), 'closed', IF(ISPICKVAL(Status, '114'), 'closed', IF(ISPICKVAL(Status, '108'), 'denied', IF(ISPICKVAL(Status, '101'), 'denied', ''))))))))))))
CustomField.label: StatutWO_Intent
